instruction: Could you help me add slide transition "dissolve" to my first page?
config: _execute_setup(command=['python', '-c', 'import pyautogui; import time;  time.sleep(4); pyautogui.doubleClick(x={SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, y={SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5);pyautogui.mouseDown(); pyautogui.mouseUp(); time.sleep(0.5);'])

evaluator.eval: check_transition(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/Ch4 Video Effect.pptx', 'dest': 'Ch4 Video Effect.pptx'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'slide_idx': 0, 'transition_type': 'dissolve'}}))
